dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal emphasizes retracement setups in trends using price action only (no additional momentum/volatility indicators). Entry detects pullback/retracement via price closing below/above recent extremes while remaining within trend direction (proximity to moving average). Exit triggers on retracement reversal (price breaking recent swing). Single data type (PRICE_ACTION) enforced per signal requirement. Stop loss kept tight at 1.5% for support/resistance placement flexibility. Context-dependent direction allows both long and short retracement trades based on primary trend direction.

Stop loss kept tight at 1.5% for support/resistance placement flexibility. Context-dependent direction allows both long and short retracement trades based on primary trend direction.

source_rule_text: A trader should use the simplest system possible, but add multiple indicators only when each is based on fundamentally different data types, to improve market trading performance without introducing noise.
